---
id: import-config-json
title: "ImportConfigJson"
description: "Imports a full config from a JSON document, persisting dimensions, default-configs and contexts in a single transaction after validating the document."
sidebar_label: "ImportConfigJson"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/superposition
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"ImportConfigJson"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/config/json/import"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Imports a full config from a JSON document, persisting dimensions, default-configs and contexts in a single transaction after validating the document.

  as={"h2"}
